expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: Result explicitly states the focus and enforces separation: “Modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering.” It further requires: “The QA plan must distinguish tests for “contextual links”… from tests for ordinary non-link elements…” and includes separate sections “A. Contextual-link styling coverage (category 1)” and “B. Ordinary element rendering coverage (category 2)”, plus “Hyperlink styling leakage prevention.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Output is labeled and structured as phase4a contract: title “Phase4a (Contract) QA Plan Output (Baseline)”, metadata “Primary phase under test: phase4a”, and section “1) Phase4a checkpoint intent (what this phase must ensure)” followed by “Phase4a advisory checklist items (what must exist in the plan at this checkpoint)” and phase4a pass/fail criteria.
